partial_progress.details: Identified mathematical unsoundness in current approach. Recommended refactoring to use RestrictedMCS.

findings.issue: f_nesting_is_bounded claims F-boundedness for arbitrary MCS, but this is mathematically false
findings.task_47_provides: restricted_mcs_F_bounded proves boundedness only for RestrictedMCS (MCS bounded by closureWithNeg)
findings.root_cause: Arbitrary MCS can contain F(phi), FF(phi), FFF(phi), ... without inconsistency
findings.recommended_approach: Refactor succ_chain_fam to use RestrictedMCS with target formula closure
findings.alternative: Mark task BLOCKED - the completeness theorem remains semantically justified by frame conditions
